Once in a while, I still forget a word.
I am traveling to Seoul this week. The delegation is arriving tomorrow.
We are meeting the rector this afternoon. She is presenting the agenda.
I am not working today. I am flying to Korea right now.
Are you preparing the conference? Yes, I am.
Good afternoon, and welcome to Seoul. Are you here for the education conference?
Yes, good afternoon. I am arriving now for the conference. My name is Maria Clara.
Wonderful. I am the university liaison. The delegation is waiting in the lobby. Are you traveling alone?
Yes, I am traveling alone this time. I am speaking English on my own.
That is great. Right now, the team is preparing the conference room. What are you looking forward to most?
I am looking forward to presenting my work tomorrow. I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
You are doing very well. The rector is announcing the agenda in one hour. Are you participating in the round table too?
Yes, I am participating in the round table on Friday. Once in a while, I still forget a word, but I keep going.
That is the right attitude. The car is departing now. Let me help you with your suitcase.
Thank you very much. I am following you now.
I am arriving now for the conference.
I am traveling alone, and I am speaking English on my own.
I am looking forward to presenting my work.
The delegation is arriving tomorrow morning.
Sorry, I don't understand. Could you repeat, please?

Good afternoon, passengers. This is an important announcement for the delegation from Brazil. Your driver is waiting at Gate Two, near the main exit. The university team is preparing your welcome at this moment. Please remember: the conference is starting at four o'clock this afternoon, not in the morning. The rector is presenting the agenda tonight, at the dinner. If you need help, our staff is standing at the information desk, in the blue shirts. Thank you, and welcome to Seoul.

Hello, Maria Clara. This is Grace, the conference coordinator. I am calling about tomorrow's schedule. Right now, we are finishing the final list of speakers. You are presenting at ten o'clock in the morning, in Room One. The other guests are arriving tonight, so we are having a small dinner at eight. Please bring your name badge. I am sending the full agenda to your email now. We are looking forward to your talk. See you soon, and have a good evening.
Good morning. I am arriving at the airport in Seoul now. Right now, the delegation is waiting in the lobby. This afternoon, we are meeting the rector. Tomorrow, I am presenting my work in English.
